_comment: Data dictionary: expert-provided meaning of each column. Attribute semantics only -- no ERD roles. Keyed by canonical column in CSV order; build_prompts.py rewrites keys to match the header transform.

dictionary.client_id: a numeric code identifying the client that placed the order
dictionary.n_order: a numeric code identifying a production order
dictionary.date: the date the order was registered in the system
dictionary.n_material: a numeric code identifying a material
dictionary.n_operation: a numeric code identifying a type of production operation
dictionary.description_operation: the description of that operation type
dictionary.workcenter_id: a numeric code identifying a work center where operations are carried out
dictionary.order_operation_id: a numeric code identifying a single execution of an operation within an order
dictionary.timestamp: the date and time at which that operation execution started
dictionary.quantity: the quantity processed in that operation execution
